summary: Unhide the `production` parent command so its subcommands (`monthly`, `hourly`, plus the four novel ones) are visible in `--help`.
reason: The generator marked `production` as `Hidden: true` because radiation/weather/horizon were single-endpoint resources promoted to root shortcuts. With 6 subcommands under production (2 generated + 4 novel), hiding the parent makes the novel commands undiscoverable from `--help`. Unhiding restores normal Cobra `production --help` discovery.
